features.description: Single-command bootstrap for a fresh Mac: installs Antigravity, Gemini Desktop, Claude Desktop, Claude Code CLI, antigravity CLI, gemini CLI, supporting Homebrew tooling, and places captured config files.
steps: scaffold configs/ scripts/ and setup.sh orchestrator
capture current-machine configs into configs/ with secret-stripping
install Homebrew formulae (node, gh, jq, ripgrep, shellcheck, shfmt)
install Claude Code CLI (curl) and Gemini CLI (npm global)
install GUI apps from official DMGs (Antigravity, Gemini, Claude)
link captured configs into OS locations with backup of pre-existing files
orchestrator wires stages with --dry-run / --skip-apps / --only flags
print post-setup auth checklist

features.description: Debian/Ubuntu CLI-only path for setup.sh: OS detection, apt install stage, shared cross-platform CLI/link-configs/verify/auth-checklist scripts, GUI-app stage filtered out. End-to-end-verified by ci-tests.yml on ubuntu-latest (run 25087515129).
steps: OS-detection helper + setup.sh dispatch (macos | debian | else error)
scripts/install-apt.sh — NodeSource + gh apt repos, apt install + shfmt fallback
make scripts/install-clis.sh cross-platform (npm prefix, rc-file pick, Node-version guard)
link-configs.sh skip Mac-only Claude Desktop path on Debian
verify-install.sh skip GUI app + Mac-only-JSON checks on Debian
auth-checklist.sh trim Antigravity + Claude Desktop steps on Debian
docs: README Debian subsection + new docs/debian.md
features.json + progress.md bookkeeping

features.description: Manually-dispatched GitHub Actions workflow that runs setup.sh / setup.ps1 on fresh Mac, Ubuntu, and Windows runners. Mac uses --skip-apps (GUI installer needs a human); Windows is smoke-only (orchestrator + AST parse). First three-platform green dispatch on 2026-04-29 (run 25087515129) authorised flipping feat-debian-cli-support.passes=true and shipping v1.0.0.
steps: .github/workflows/ci-tests.yml — workflow with macos-test / ubuntu-test / windows-test jobs, workflow_dispatch only, cancel-in-progress concurrency
README badge + docs update (debian.md future-work pointer at CI)
close out: flip feat-ci-verification.passes and feat-debian-cli-support.passes to true after first three-platform green run; v1.0.0 release

features.description: Real Windows install verification — replaces the smoke-only Windows job from feat-ci-verification with a full install pipeline. Windows scope matches Mac (full GUI + CLI: Antigravity Desktop + Claude Desktop installed via winget; Gemini Desktop has no first-party app, skipped). winget for toolchain (Git, Node LTS, gh, ripgrep). Claude Code via native PowerShell installer; Gemini via npm; Codex skipped on Windows (upstream npm packaging bugs). v1.1.0 ships when ci-tests.yml windows-test job goes green end-to-end.
steps: scripts/install-tooling.ps1 — winget Git + Node LTS + gh + ripgrep
scripts/install-clis.ps1 — Claude native installer + Gemini npm; Codex skip-with-warn
scripts/install-gui-apps.ps1 — winget Antigravity + Claude Desktop
scripts/link-configs.ps1 — symlink-with-copy-fallback CLAUDE.md, Windows-native paths, Co-Authored-By kill-switch merge
scripts/verify-install.ps1 — Windows post-setup health check
scripts/auth-checklist.ps1 — Windows manual auth steps
setup.ps1 — orchestrator wiring + --with-codex flag
ci-tests.yml windows-test upgraded from smoke to real install pipeline
docs/windows.md rewrite + README + close out features.passes=true; v1.1.0
